summary: Iteration 205: Report Ispezioni VT/Dimensionali EN 1090-2:2024 - All backend tests passed (22/22). Frontend UI verified: ReportIspezioniSection renders with 10 VT + 8 DIM checks, OK/NOK buttons toggle correctly, Misura/Note fields editable, Save persists data, Approve disabled until all checks filled, PDF generation works. Integration with Controllo Finale verified: vt_nc_chiuse now labeled 'Report Ispezioni VT approvato' and reads from report_ispezioni collection.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id} returns 10 VT checks (ISO 5817 Tab.1) + 8 DIM checks (EN 1090-2 B6/B8) with stats and metadata
POST /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id} saves ispezioni_vt + ispezioni_dim arrays with {check_id, esito, valore_misurato, note} objects
POST /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}/approva validates all 18 checks are filled before allowing approval
GET /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}/pdf generates valid PDF (26KB+) with VT+DIM tables using WeasyPrint
Controllo Finale integration: vt_nc_chiuse check now reads from report_ispezioni collection and shows 'Report Ispezioni VT approvato' label
Frontend ReportIspezioniSection placed between TracciabilitaMateriali and ControlloFinale on CommessaHubPage
Frontend has dual-area tabs (VT/DIM), OK/NOK toggle buttons, Misura/Note input fields, Save/Approve/PDF buttons
Approve button correctly disabled until all 18 checks are filled (completo=true)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test commessa.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 205 verified the new Report Ispezioni VT/Dimensionali module. Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}, POST /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}/approva, GET /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}/pdf. The report has 18 total checks (10 VT per ISO 5817 Livello C + 8 DIM per EN 1090-2 B6/B8). Frontend ReportIspezioniSection is placed between TracciabilitaMateriali and ControlloFinale on CommessaHubPage. The Controllo Finale's 'vt_nc_chiuse' check was renamed to 'Report Ispezioni VT approvato' and now reads from the report_ispezioni collection to show approval status. All 11 Controllo Finale checks still work correctly (regression verified).

backend_endpoints.GET /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}: PASS - Returns 10 VT + 8 DIM checks with stats (ok/nok/pending/totale)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}: PASS - Saves inspection results, returns report_id
PASS - Validates all checks filled, returns 400 if incomplete
backend_endpoints.GET /api/report-ispezioni/{commessa_id}/: PASS - Returns valid PDF (26KB+) with Content-Disposition header
backend_endpoints.GET /api/controllo-finale/{commessa_id}: PASS (regression) - Returns 11 checks, vt_nc_chiuse reads from report_ispezioni
